By enabling customers to make quick, QR-led payments that connect directly to merchants芒聙聶 systems, Local helps restaurants, cafes, hotels, and hospitals improve transaction efficiency and gain real-time business insights. The platform is tailored to local market needs, offering reliable, scalable payment infrastructure aligned with regional behaviors and regulations. Backed by 500 Global Sanabil, Local collaborates with Point-of-Sale providers and enterprises to optimize operational workflows and elevate the customer experience. Join us in revolutionizing payments and creating smarter, seamless commerce in the GCC.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Role Description</strong></p><p>This is a full-time, on-site Operations Executive role based in Riyadh, with an expectation to travel around the country (mainly Jeddah and Eastern Province). The Operations Executive will oversee and streamline daily operations, ensuring efficient workflows and adherence to company policies. The role involves analyzing operational data, coordinating with teams to resolve process issues, and supporting operational management initiatives to enhance efficiency and performance. <strong>A core function will be to support the onboarding, monitoring, and ongoing support of existing and future merchants. </strong>The candidate will maintain effective communication with stakeholders, foster positive working relationships, and drive operational excellence in alignment with company goals.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Proficiency in Operations and Operations Management</li><li>Strong Analytical Skills for evaluating performance and problem-solving</li><li>Excellent Interpersonal and Communication Skills for effective stakeholder collaboration</li><li>Previous experience in a similar role is advantageous</li><li>Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment</li><li>Bachelor芒聙聶s degree in Business Administration, Operations, or a related field is preferred</li><li><strong>Car and driver's license absolutely essential</strong></li><li>Familiarity with payment systems, Point of Sale software, or commerce platforms is a plus</li></ul> customer support, dev, travel 脴炉脴篓脵聤, 脴炉脴篓脵聤 脴搂脵聞脴楼脵聟脴搂脴卤脴搂脴陋 脴搂脵聞脴鹿脴卤脴篓脵聤脴漏 脴搂脵聞脵聟脴陋脴颅脴炉脴漏 2026-05-24T23:42:55+00:00 1132209 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-operations-executive-local-1132209 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Freelance Pharmaceutical Proofreader Pickle <strong>About Us<br><br></strong>At our organisation, we redefine executive and business support through exceptional problem-solving, proactive execution, and advanced integration of technology and AI. We partner with purpose-led leaders who value strategic collaborators capable of swiftly turning complexity into clarity and challenges into opportunities.<br><br>You are highly tech-savvy and naturally leverage tools, including AI, to design, deliver, and scale impactful programs. Whether your background is in program management, operations, product, or enablement, you excel at driving clarity, alignment, and measurable outcomes across complex initiatives.<br><br>Join a culture that prioritises clarity, practical innovation, and the seamless integration of human intuition with technology and AI-driven efficiency.<br><br><strong>About Our Client And The RoleAbout The Company<br><br></strong>Our client is a specialist UK-based delivery partner supporting pharmaceutical and medical device organisations across marketing, communications, education, and events. Working across print, digital, and live engagement channels, they deliver high-quality, compliant project execution within highly regulated environments.<br><br>Their work is built around strong operational delivery, deep understanding of pharmaceutical compliance processes, and a modern approach to project execution supported by technology and AI-enabled workflows.<br><br>This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing, agile delivery team supporting global healthcare brands on complex and fast-moving projects.<br><br>The Opportunity<br><br>We are looking for a highly detail-oriented <strong>Freelance Pharmaceutical Proofreader</strong> with experience reviewing pharmaceutical and healthcare content across print and digital formats.<br><br>This role is focused specifically on proofreading and quality checking materials before client delivery and approval. The successful candidate will have exceptional attention to detail, strong written English skills, and previous experience proofreading within regulated healthcare or pharmaceutical environments.<br><br>You will work closely with project managers, copywriters, designers, and delivery teams to ensure materials are accurate, consistent, polished, and client-ready.<br><br>This is an ideal opportunity for an experienced freelance proofreader who enjoys fast-paced project work and takes pride in delivering high-quality, error-free content.<br><br><strong>What We芒聙聶re Looking
